title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery. The model reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 in drug design tasks and enables applications including drug toxicity prediction, cancer drug discovery, drug repurposing, and antibody generation.
